strategy: This golem has only 5,000 health, so blade up and burst it down with your strongest attack school; it is not stunable.
Do not cast wards. A harmful Ward (trap) triggers a delayed 120 Fire hit on you, and a helpful Ward (shield) triggers a Fire Elf plus the same delayed Fire hit.
Do not shield-turtle. Blade your hitter and end the fight fast instead.
It lays Mass Fire Trap on round 1 and every other round, boosting the fire coming at you, so kill it before that stacks.
cheatNotes: Casting a harmful Ward (a trap) lands a delayed 120 Fire hit on you 4 rounds later. Skip trap setup.
Casting a helpful Ward (a shield) makes the Noxious Gas Golem Fire Elf itself and drops the same delayed 120 Fire hit on you. Blade and hit instead of shielding.
Round 1 and every other round it casts Mass Fire Trap, boosting the fire damage coming at you. Kill it quickly.
